channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israel’s Mossad relies on US cover and security rot for Iran strikes
item.description: The Israeli intelligence agency counts on unconditional US cover and adversary lapses for its assassination policy.

item.title: Is Israel reshaping Lebanon, trying to separate Hezbollah from its people?
item.description: Analysts say Israel's actions in Lebanon, including mass displacement, are an effort to reshape the country.

item.title: We, the American people, have had enough of endless wars
item.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is illegal and goes against the interests of the American people.

item.title: Israel escalates attacks across Lebanon as two soldiers killed
item.description: Israeli military confirms first fatalities in Lebanon a week after fighting resumes with Hezbollah.

item.title: Iran women’s football team sing anthem amid safety concerns during war
item.description: Players sing, salute during anthem in last Asian Cup game as rights activists raise concerns over their return to Iran.

item.title: Amid escalation, Iran religious scholars signal new leader to be named soon
item.description: 'Some obstacles have to be removed' and selection must be undisputed inside government, Assembly of Experts members say.

item.title: UNICEF spokesman enraged over child casualties from Israeli-US Iran war
item.description: UNICEF spokesman James Elder stressed the importance of growing numbers of children killed in global conflicts.

item.title: Al Jazeera reporter boards first flight to Doha since war on Iran
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Osama Bin Javaid reports from aboard the first flight heading to Doha from Paris since the war on Iran.

item.title: Tehran residents donate blood amid ongoing US-Israel attacks on Iran
item.description: Residents in Tehran are flocking to blood donation centres, responding to growing medical needs and fears of shortages.

item.title: Iran war threatens prolonged impact on energy markets as oil prices rise
item.description: The conflict has already led to the suspension of almost a fifth of global crude oil and natural gas supply.
